features: Only Works: For Honor Pad X9/X8 Pro 11.5", Not for Redmi Pad/Redmi Pad Pro or any other models. Please check your phone model before buying this tempered glass screen protector.

Easy Install Kit&Bubble-Free: Easy-installation frame help you install the screen protector easily without worrying about aligning the screen and cleaning kit ensure bubble-free application every time.Please watch our installation video tutorial before installation.

Case Friendly&screen Protection: The screen protector leaves enough space for the installation of most tablet cases. Maximum coverage of your tablet without interfering with the tablet Case.9H hardness tempered glass offers scratch resistance and drop protection for your tablet.

Product Features: 0.33mm ultra-thin screen protector maintains the original response sensitivity;Support fingerprint unlocking；2.5D rounded edges which feels smooth and never scratches;99.9% transparency preserving phone's original high-definition retina viewing experience.
Package Including: 2 Pcs Tempered Glass screen protector;1 Pc Easy Installation Frame;2 packs installation accessory kits.
description: Product Description Q: Does this product support fingerprint unlock? A: Yes, they protect your phone well without interfering with fingerprint sensor usage. Q:How can I remove bubbles? A:If you get a bubble during installation screen protector, just lift the nearest corner to the bubble, then set it back down, and the bubble should go away. Q: How do I resolve problem if I have a product problem? A: If you can't find the installation video, buy the wrong model of screen protector, or have any questions, you can send the information to us through the Amazon Message Center.
